title: Grilled Portuguese Manchego Cheese Stir-fry
description: A rich and light dish featuring Portuguese Manchego cheese grilled to perfection with a quick stir-fry of aromatic vegetables and herbs for an elegant presentation.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the finely chopped onion and leek into the skillet with garlic. Stir occasionally until softened, about 5 minutes.
Increase heat to high, add remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet. Add diced red bell pepper and zucchini; toss well for even cooking, about 3-4 minutes.
Reduce heat back to medium-high and remove from heat when vegetables are lightly browned but still tender.
Return the skillet to the stove with the chopped spinach leaves. Cook until wilted and bright green, about a minute.
Add crumbled Manchego cheese into the skillet with the cooked vegetables and spinach. Mix well until cheese is melted and evenly distributed among all ingredients.
Season with paprika flakes for added depth of flavor and garnish with extra grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
